title: Simple Ores Addon
description: It's a mod that is required for both (Weapons Effect(Later)) and (Mega Breaker Tools), and this mod add new ores and new crafting tables for more complex craftings.
body:
This is a mod that is required for (Weapons Effect) and (Mega Breaker Tools) because of the ores and the new Crafting Tables.



## New Crafting Tables

Simple Crafting Table = 5x5

Ultra Crafting Table = 7x7

Atomic Crafting Table = 9x9

i create this craftings for the new recipes that the other mods have.



## Ores

If you have played (Weapons Effect) the ores are same, and i don't think i will add more ores, let's see in the future.
